mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, toc_user_id, consent_type, consent_version, signed_offline, signed_at, file_id, status, remark, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM consent_record WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consent_record ( tenant_id, patient_id, toc_user_id, consent_type, consent_version, signed_offline, signed_at, file_id, status, remark ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{tocUserId}, #{consentType}, #{consentVersion}, #{signedOffline}, #{signedAt}, #{fileId}, #{status}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE consent_record SET patient_id = #{patientId}, toc_user_id = #{tocUserId}, consent_type = #{consentType}, consent_version = #{consentVersion}, signed_offline = #{signedOffline}, signed_at = #{signedAt}, file_id = #{fileId}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
